Name: Total time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to the final EIC decision (e.g., SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Reject) in the review process
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 Cycle Time within the reviewer selection sub-process
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and the end of the case

Name: Average time since the Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and SW-AE Assign Reviewers are performed in the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'

Name: Minimum time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and SW-Reviewer Unavailable
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'

Name: Total time it takes Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 after the execution of SW-Reviewer Selection is now due
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'

Name: Time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to manuscript status change (e.g., Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Average time it takes the Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to be done after a reviewer invitation reminder cascade (e.g., following Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'

Name: Total waiting time to the Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 from the previous reviewer selection deadline activity
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'

Name: Time to Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 since the SW-Reviewer Declined activity that triggered it
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'

Name: Average time for Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 grouped by the specific AE assignment activity (e.g., SW-AE Assign Reviewers, RW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'", 'end': '', 'aggregation': 'average', 'group_by': 'activity'}"
